Data Fields

const_pool_t Struct Reference

#include <constantpool.h>

Data Fields

uint16_t entries
 Number of entries in the costant-pool.
uint8_t * tags
 Tags array.
jword_t data []
 Data array.

Detailed Description

Structure representing a class' constant pool. Note that the first entry of the constant pool is usually unaccessible, yet the cp_set_tag_and_data() is allowed to access it. The entry there contained is a pointer to the class to which the constant pool belongs too
